data.description:
Lints merge-to-main*.sh scripts under $PLUGIN_DIR/scripts/ that do not exist in this repo. Evidence: zero inbound references; git grep merge-to-main -> only this file + comment ticket_graph/_links.py:198.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] git rm src/rebar/_engine/check-merge-tickets-dir.sh
- [ ] _links.py:198 comment drops the merge-to-main-direct.sh mention
- [ ] Full suite green
data.title: Delete orphan: check-merge-tickets-dir.sh (+ stale merge-to-main citation in _links.py)
